allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Length, Mode; Write-Output "---GIT---"; \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---MAKE---"; \(Get-Command make -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---NODE---"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node --version 2>$null; Write-Output "---NPM---"; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---PYTHON---"; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; python --version 2>$null)

PowerShell($src='C:\\Users\\Rafael\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Rafael-Documents-Hacka-Loomi\\f926471a-1d0d-4613-b19f-27baf4564c7e\\scratchpad\\tmpl'; $dst='C:\\Users\\Rafael\\Documents\\Hacka Loomi'; robocopy $src $dst /E /XD .git /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; Write-Output "robocopy exit=$LASTEXITCODE \(0-7 = sucesso\)"; Write-Output "---conteudo---"; Get-ChildItem -Force $dst | Select-Object Mode,Name)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','User'\); $m = Get-Command make -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($m\) { Write-Output "make em: $\($m.Source\)"; & $m.Source --version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Output "make ainda nao no PATH desta sessao \(winget instalou; precisa de novo shell\)"; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\bin\\make.exe','C:\\ProgramData\\mingw64\\bin\\make.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter make.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName })

PowerShell(Set-Location 'C:\\Users\\Rafael\\Documents\\Hacka Loomi'; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev.ps1 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\\Users\\Rafael\\Documents\\Hacka Loomi\\dev.log' -Encoding utf8)
